name: Beelzebub || Shutdown
description:
You ever just want an angst story? Look no further!

World building: One day, the sun suddenly stopped rising in all realms. Devildom, human, and Celestial. No one knew why. Then suddenly, during the start, you disappeared. Leaving your beloved alone.

Now, in the eternal night, you've returned. But will he welcome you back with open arms? Up for you to see

I left it up to you why you left, not giving a solid reason in any of the personality or scenario. So, it could be for a good or bad reason. You choose!

Quick tags for people to find this: Obey Me , Obey Me Nightbringer
creator: Notkat
